title: The NULL Merchant and Other Silent Precondition Traps for Data-Science Agents — study artifacts
description: Reproducibility package for both frozen batteries: seeded task-environment generators, frozen task environments, task prompts and the warned-ablation preamble, ~1,200 scored agent transcripts including all 1,000 battery runs, both run ledgers, the pre-registered Battery Two design protocol with amendments and operator log plus complete design-session transcripts, scoring tools with embedded answer keys, the development-history supplementary report, and human-verification records.
